prompt: I've been setting up this IoT project with BMAD and all the planning docs are done. Sprint status file exists with 3 epics, first one is in-progress with story 1.2 ready-for-dev. Go ahead and auto implement the rest.

assertions.text: Reads sprint-status.yaml before doing anything else
Skips story 1.1 which is already done
Story 1.2 with ready-for-dev status starts at Step 3 (Develop), not Step 1
Uses Agent tool with team_name parameter, not a disposable sub-agent
